name: fast-speech-safe-clause
marked: The presenter moved quickly through the setup steps | then paused briefly so everyone could verify the final configuration

name: punctuation-free-conversation
marked: I mean that the smaller model works well for daily use | you only need the larger one for heavy workloads

name: comparison-keeps-than-phrase
marked: This compact kettle heats water significantly faster than the stove top model | even during repeated tests in the cold laboratory

name: numbers-and-electrical-units
marked: Our electrical system limits ordinary outlets to 120 volts and 1500 watts | specialized circuits can safely provide 240 volts and 3000 watts

name: dense-enumeration
marked: The kit includes two filters three adapters and a short charging cable | each component fits inside the supplied carrying case

name: relative-clause
marked: The controller that monitors battery temperature adjusts the charging current automatically | which prevents excessive heat during long summer drives

name: phrasal-verb-reporting-clause
marked: Let me point out that the least expensive adapter I could get my hands on | still handled every device in our overnight test

name: causal-clause
marked: The backup service remained online throughout the outage | because its batteries had finished charging before the storm arrived

name: parenthetical
marked: The newer unit unlike the original prototype runs quietly on the desk | and it consumes much less power during routine operation

name: no-safe-boundary-fallback
marked: If the network connection disappears while the firmware update is still being installed the recovery process may take several additional minutes
